items.name: volcengine-theme
items.title: Volcengine Theme
items.description: Volcengine UI V3 CSS variables for vc components.
items.docs: After installation, import the generated file in your app entry, for example: import "@/lib/volcengine-theme.css".

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Pagination component with Volcengine Arco design tokens.
items.docs: Provides page navigation controls styled with Arco design tokens.

items.name: s-table
items.title: STable
items.description: Editable table component based on Volcengine Arco design tokens.
items.docs: STable requires the Volcengine theme file. If styles look missing, import "@/lib/volcengine-theme.css" in your app entry.

items.name: s-action-group
items.title: SActionGroup
items.description: Action button group with overflow dropdown menu.
items.docs: Requires button and dropdown-menu components in your ui directory.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Tooltip component based on @base-ui/react with Volcengine Arco design tokens.

items.name: s-side-menu
items.title: SSideMenu
items.description: Collapsible side navigation menu with search, overview and multi-level support.
items.docs: SSideMenu provides a Volcengine-style sidebar navigation with collapse, search and tooltip support.
